summary: The is_raw_audio_stream() no longer returns True for stream=True without stream_format, silently breaking external clients; add a warning when stream=True is used without stream_format.
The not self.is_raw_audio_stream() guard in is_sse_stream() is redundant but adds clarity; consider simplifying or documenting why it's kept.
Missing e2e test for the new default streaming behavior when stream=True is set without stream_format; add a test asserting SSE speech.audio.* events.
